mapper.sql: from payment_offline_refund_process ofr left join payment_business_order bo on bo.id = ofr.business_order_id and bo.tenant_id = ofr.tenant_id left join payment_refund_order ro on ro.id = ofr.refund_order_id and ro.tenant_id = ofr.tenant_id left join payment_channel c on c.id = ofr.channel_id and c.tenant_id = ofr.tenant_id

select ofr.id, ofr.offline_refund_no as offlineRefundNo, ofr.offline_collection_id as offlineCollectionId, ofr.offline_collection_no as offlineCollectionNo, ofr.refund_order_id as refundOrderId, ro.refund_order_no as refundOrderNo, ofr.payment_order_id as paymentOrderId, ofr.pay_order_no as payOrderNo, ofr.business_order_id as businessOrderId, ofr.biz_order_no as bizOrderNo, bo.title, bo.app_code as appId, ofr.channel_id as channelId, coalesce(ofr.channel_code, c.channel_code) as channelCode, c.channel_name as channelName, ofr.refund_amount as refundAmount, ofr.currency, ofr.refund_account_name as refundAccountName, ofr.refund_account_no_mask as refundAccountNoMask, ofr.refund_bank_name as refundBankName, ofr.refund_voucher_file_ids as refundVoucherFileIds, ofr.refund_voucher_count as refundVoucherCount, ofr.reason, ofr.remark, ofr.refund_status as refundStatus, ofr.refunded_time as refundedTime, ofr.operator_id as operatorId, ofr.operator_name as operatorName, ofr.created_at as createTime, ofr.updated_at as updateTime
mapper.select: order by ofr.created_at desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}
